name: Alphonso (Hapus)
description: The King of Mangoes. Rich, creamy, saffron-hued pulp with a sweet-spicy aroma. Among the most prized varieties in India.

name: Kesar
description: Known as the Queen of Mangoes, Kesar offers a distinct sweet taste with a gorgeous saffron-like colour and a heavenly aroma.

name: Khadar
description: A large, juicy Karnataka variety with a rich golden pulp and a distinctly sweet flavour. A seasonal favourite among mango lovers.

name: Kalmi
description: An elongated, smooth-skinned variety with a mild sweetness and firm pulp. Popular for its long shelf life and refreshing taste.
